summary: The diff implements core routing/navigation, authentication UI (Internet Identity), tournament creation and listing/query hooks, a theme via CSS variables, and basic registration UI components. However, there is no clear evidence of bracket/match management or announcements, and backend persistence/upgrade-safe stable storage cannot be confirmed from the truncated backend diff. Image asset files themselves are not evidenced in the provided diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Tournaments persist across canister upgrades using stable storage patterns appropriate for a single-actor Motoko canister; and status/transition validation (e.g., cannot register when not open).
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo is truncated and shows in-memory vars/maps but no visible stable variables, preupgrade/postupgrade hooks, or explicit validation logic for status transitions/registration gating beyond what may exist in truncated sections.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add match/bracket management for organizers: create rounds, assign registrations to matches, record results, and display read-only bracket/round view; with backend enforcement that only organizer/admin can modify matches/results.
missing_requirements.reason: No files in the diff summary show data models or endpoints for rounds/matches/results, nor any UI pages/components for bracket management or read-only bracket display.
evidence: frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (truncated but shows tournaments/registrations/profile hooks, no bracket hooks evidenced)

missing_requirements.requirement: Publish announcements (text updates) shown on the Tournament Details page, with organizer-only controls and non-organizer access restrictions.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of announcement data models/methods in backend or UI components/hooks for creating and rendering announcements in the provided diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filenames (ffm-tournament-logo.dim_512x512.png, ffm-hero-banner.dim_1600x600.png) and are used in the UI.
missing_requirements.reason: UI references the logo path in AppNav, but the diff summary does not show the actual image files added under frontend/public/assets/generated, nor any reference/evidence for the hero banner file usage.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media footer section (X/Facebook/Instagram/YouTube) and a caffeine.ai referral link in the app footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest focuses on tournament functionality, auth, theme, and specific assets.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-token/secret URL parameter flow and explicit access-control initialization call from the frontend actor hook.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requires Internet Identity and gating organizer actions, but does not request a URL-secret-based admin bootstrap mechanism.

hallucinated_features.description: Role/permission system scaffolding (authorization mixins/access control, admin/user permissions) beyond simple organizer-principal checks.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQs mention organizer/admin gating but do not request a full role/permission framework; this is extra implementation not explicitly specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark/light theme toggling via next-themes ThemeProvider.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 requires a coherent theme, but does not request runtime theme switching support.
